purpose: Promote the Web3 grants, hackathons, bounties, and airdrop-adjacent lane from a generic checkpoint game into a lane-specific expedition map with generated portal texture, five evidence-derived route sites, and explicit wallet/deployment/submission gates.

queries: grant management dashboard deadline pipeline UI inspiration
hackathon project submission dashboard milestones judging UI
web3 grants hackathon bounty dashboard wallet submission gates UI
Ethereum Foundation Ecosystem Support Program wishlist grants RFP
ETHGlobal hackathon project submission judging criteria
DoraHacks grant bounty hackathon dashboard submission
design_takeaways: Grant and hackathon work should show source discovery, fit scoring, prototype readiness, deadline route state, and submission readiness as separate stations.
Web3-specific wallet, deployment, transaction, quest, public application, and payment boundaries should be visible as sealed gates.
The lane should feel like an expedition map rather than a generic task list, while remaining entirely local and reusable.

image_generation.prompt_summary: Premium dark Web3 builder observatory expedition map with grant portals, hackathon gates, route ribbons, prototype blueprint tiles, proof beacons, duplicate-sweep compass, and sealed wallet/submission vault; no text, people, logos, or currency symbols.

frontend_features: Added grant-expedition dispatch and step-count support.
Added five data-derived route sites: Source Atlas, Grant Fit, Prototype Camp, Deadline Route, and Wallet Gate.
Added a lane-specific board with portal nodes, route shimmer, orbit rings, meter cards, sealed gate states, and responsive desktop/mobile layouts.
Added versioned cache keys and README documentation for standalone reuse.
safety_boundaries: The module reads local trail/snapshot data only.
It does not connect to grant portals, hackathon accounts, wallets, deployments, transactions, quests, payment systems, or submission flows.
The wallet station visualizes those boundaries as sealed.
